mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event (name, location, event_date, reg_start_time, reg_end_time, quota, entry_fee, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{location}, #{eventDate}, #{regStartTime}, #{regEndTime}, #{quota}, #{entryFee}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.sql: e.*, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration r WHERE r.event_id = e.id AND r.status = 1 ), 0) AS registered_count
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM event e ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM event e WHERE 1=1
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND e.status = #{status}
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE event SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
